calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2006 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-29-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: M. Vallejo, Reporter: Karen Farnsworth

Jonathan L. Piper, Esq. for Petitioner: Brenda Arvie, present as Guardian at litem for: Savannah Hudson, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $503.24
Medical Expenses $988.27
Costs $988.79
A net balance of $2,509.70 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo, 59 Buckinngham Way, San Francisco, CA.
No withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
